executiveSummary.text: Kongregate Inc. (KRX) is now back in sync with the canonical DYOR HQ sheet after the metadata repair pass. The current stance is HOLD with conviction 50/100, using N/A as the latest stored price reference where available.

businessModel.text: Kongregate Inc. supplies food and ingredients markets, where pricing, innovation, customer retention and raw-material management drive returns. The corrected note removes the previous generic placeholder language.

recentCatalysts.text: Volume recovery, reformulation demand, margin progression and portfolio discipline are the key catalysts.

thesisEvaluation.text: Base case: the core operating backdrop remains good enough to support the present hold stance, but not strong enough to justify a looser risk view without better evidence. Bull case: execution and demand improve faster than expected. Bear case: operating or funding pressure worsens and compresses valuation further.

keyRisks.text: Input-cost swings can affect margins. Customer destocking can pressure volumes. Innovation cycles may not convert as expected. FX can affect reported earnings. A weaker consumer backdrop can reduce end-demand.

risks.risk: Innovation cycles may not convert as expected.
A weaker consumer backdrop can reduce end-demand.

whoShouldOwn.text: Own: Investors looking for ingredients exposure with moderate defensive qualities. Avoid: Investors wanting rapid top-line growth or low raw-material sensitivity.

recommendation.text: HOLD - Conviction: 50/100. This rebuilt page is intentionally concise, but it is now internally coherent and aligned to the corrected ticker and company metadata.

entryExit.text: Keep position sizing consistent with a hold stance until fuller company-specific analysis is refreshed.
